name: Short Expiry - Clearance: Delicious Meaty Strips With Beef 200g
shortDescription: Delicious mini steaks with beef 200gr with over 20 treats, contains Vitamin A, D & E, Calcium and no added sugar.
description: Delicious mini steaks with beef 200gr with over 20 treats, contains Vitamin A, D & E, Calcium and no added sugar. Crude Protein 18% Crude Fat 4% Crude Fiber 3% Crude Ash 1% Moisture 20% Only a small percentage of the declared protein will be useful to the pet. Composition: Cereals, meat and animal by products (Beef 4%), Yeasts, Derivates of vegetable origin, Calcium carbonate. Guidelines & warnings: Always supervise when feeding your pet, especially if your pet is unaccustomed to this product. Serve limited amounts initially, excessive use of this product may cause gastric upset. Always ensure a bowl of fresh clean water is available. Should be given on a non-stainable surface as this product may stain. Please refer to the ingredients listing. Complementary pet food for dogs- not a primary feeding product. To be stored in a cool dry condition.
